title: agrostis ramosa
intro: Agrostis ramosa, also known as the bent grass or red top, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis ramosa include treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as soothing skin irritations and reducing fever. Agrostis ramosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
